# Project Brief Template

<!-- Generated by: Skill 02 (Goal & Brief) -->
<!-- Trigger: After product-intent.yaml is populated -->
<!-- Purpose: Single source of truth for what we're building and why. -->
<!-- Lives at: PROJECT_BRIEF.md in the project root -->
<!-- Updated: Every prompt that changes scope or direction -->

## Product Thesis

**Domain:** `example.com`
**Type:** SaaS | Marketing Site | Internal Tool | Ecommerce | Docs | Nonprofit
**One-liner:** [Verb] [benefit] for [audience] without [pain point]

## Target Users

| Persona | Pain Point | Current Solution | Why We Win |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| Small nonprofit director | Tracking volunteer hours is spreadsheet chaos | Google Sheets / paper | Simple UI, auto-reminders, free tier |
| Volunteer coordinator | Can't see who's available when | Group texts | Calendar view, shift swaps |
| Monthly donor | No visibility into impact | Annual PDF report | Real-time dashboard |

## Core Features (MVP)

<!-- Ordered by value delivered. Each feature is a vertical slice. -->
<!-- Format: Feature Name — one sentence description — priority (P0/P1/P2) -->

1. **[Feature Name]** — [What it does in one sentence] — P0
2. **[Feature Name]** — [What it does in one sentence] — P0
3. **[Feature Name]** — [What it does in one sentence] — P1
4. **[Feature Name]** — [What it does in one sentence] — P1
5. **[Feature Name]** — [What it does in one sentence] — P2

## Non-Goals (Explicit Scope Boundaries)

<!-- Things we deliberately do NOT build. Prevents scope creep. -->

- No mobile native app (PWA handles mobile)
- No marketplace features (single-vendor only)
- No video hosting (embed from YouTube/Vimeo)

## Business Model

**Revenue:** [subscription | donation | one-time | free]
**Pricing:**
- Free tier: [what's included]
- Paid tier: $[X]/month — [what upgrades]

**Key Metric:** [The one number that proves product-market fit]
**Target:** [Specific number by specific date]

## Competitive Landscape

<!-- From Skill 17 research -->

| Competitor | Price | Strength | Weakness We Exploit |
|-----------|-------|----------|-------------------|
| Competitor A | $29/mo | Market leader | No free tier, dated UI |
| Competitor B | Free | Open source | Requires self-hosting, no support |
| Competitor C | $99/mo | Enterprise features | Overkill for small orgs |

## Technical Decisions

<!-- Key architectural choices and WHY -->

- **Hosting:** Cloudflare Workers + Pages (edge performance, free tier generous)
- **Database:** D1 (simple relational needs, zero config)
- **Auth:** Clerk (fast integration, handles edge cases)
- **Payments:** Stripe (industry standard, good DX)

## Success Criteria

<!-- When is V1 DONE? Measurable, specific. -->

- [ ] Homepage loads in < 2s on 3G
- [ ] Core user journey completable in < 3 clicks
- [ ] Lighthouse score >= 90 on all pages
- [ ] Zero accessibility violations (axe-core)
- [ ] E2E tests pass on all 6 breakpoints
- [ ] At least one real user can complete the primary flow
- [ ] Production URL responds with correct content

## Open Questions

<!-- Things that need user input before proceeding -->
<!-- Only ask if the answer changes architecture, billing, security, or legal -->

1. [Question] — impacts [what decision]
2. [Question] — impacts [what decision]
